gst_rate.description: Federal Goods and Services Tax rate applicable to taxable supplies in Canada

alberta_pst_rate.description: Alberta has no Provincial Sales Tax; only federal GST applies
alberta_pst_rate.l2laaf_note: For Alberta transactions, total consumption tax equals GST rate only

alberta_total_tax_rate.description: Combined consumption tax rate for transactions with place of supply in Alberta (GST only, no PST/HST)

registration_threshold.description: Mandatory GST/HST registration threshold: total taxable revenue from worldwide sales

voluntary_registration_permitted.description: Businesses below the $30,000 threshold may register voluntarily to claim Input Tax Credits

alcohol_zero_rated.description: Alcoholic beverages are NOT zero-rated; they are fully taxable at the standard GST rate
alcohol_zero_rated.l2laaf_note: All alcohol transactions on Kaskflow and PROOF must collect GST

basic_groceries_zero_rated.description: Basic groceries are generally zero-rated (taxable at 0%); alcoholic beverages are explicitly excluded from this category

place_of_supply_physical_goods.description: For physical goods, the applicable tax rate is determined by the delivery destination (province), not the seller's location

platform_operator_collection_obligation.description: Distribution platform operators facilitating taxable supplies may be required to collect and remit GST/HST on behalf of third-party sellers

platform_operator_reporting_obligation.description: Platform operators must report information to CRA on third-party vendors using their platforms

filing_frequency_annual_threshold.description: Annual filing for businesses with taxable supplies under this amount

filing_frequency_quarterly_threshold.description: Quarterly filing for businesses with taxable supplies between $1.5M and $6M

filing_frequency_monthly_threshold.description: Monthly filing for businesses with taxable supplies over $6M

hst_rates_by_province.description: HST rates for provinces that combine GST with provincial component; used when place of supply is outside Alberta
hst_rates_by_province.l2laaf_note: Initial launch is Alberta-only (5% GST). This table is included for future multi-province expansion (Phase 47.4)

digital_services_tax_status.description: Canadian DST was rescinded June 29, 2025; Bill C-15 repeals retroactively. Not applicable to L2LAAF.
